brief.context:
Test scenario: Ring Power is evaluating AI to improve sales + operations across equipment sales, rentals, parts, and service.

Primary goals:
- Reduce quote turnaround time for complex equipment opportunities.
- Improve service triage and dispatch prioritization.
- Forecast parts demand and reduce stockout risk.
- Increase first-time fix rate and technician productivity.

Constraints:
- Existing systems are fragmented across CRM/ERP/service tools.
- Outputs must be auditable and reviewed by humans before high-impact decisions.
- Strong requirement for governance, access control, and reliability.
- Team wants internal capability transfer, not vendor lock-in.

Buying audience:
COO, VP Service Operations, Head of Parts, IT Director.

Success outcomes for this test:
- 25-35% faster quote cycle
- 10-15% higher first-time fix rate
- 15-20% lower urgent parts shortages
- Clear governance and rollout model across pilot -> scale
brief.customPrompt: Keep Eduba branding fixed. Make the video feel executive and practical. Use all 8 section scenes (hero, consulting, why-us, services, methodology, choice, faq, cta). Prioritize animated diagrams over decorative visuals: pipeline flow, decision matrix, rollout timeline, and model comparison chart. Use concise commercial language and concrete outcome framing.

meta.title: Transforming Ring Power with AI Solutions
meta.ctaText: Discover how AI can elevate your operations.

scenes.headline: Unlock Efficiency with AI at Ring Power
scenes.subcopy: Revolutionize your sales and operations with tailored AI solutions.
scenes.voiceoverScript: At Ring Power, we harness AI to streamline your operations. Experience faster quotes and improved service delivery.
scenes.illustrationPrompt: Animated diagram showing a streamlined process flow for sales and operations.

scenes.headline: Tailored Consulting for Your Needs
scenes.subcopy: Our experts analyze your unique challenges to implement effective AI solutions.
scenes.voiceoverScript: We provide customized consulting to identify your specific needs. Our team ensures solutions fit seamlessly into your existing systems.
scenes.illustrationPrompt: Diagram illustrating a consulting process with steps for analysis and implementation.

scenes.headline: Why Choose Ring Power?
scenes.subcopy: Proven track record in enhancing operational efficiency with AI.
scenes.voiceoverScript: With years of industry experience, we ensure reliable and effective AI solutions tailored to your needs.
scenes.illustrationPrompt: Comparison chart highlighting Ring Power's strengths against competitors.

scenes.headline: Comprehensive AI Services
scenes.subcopy: From sales to service, our AI solutions cover all bases.
scenes.voiceoverScript: Our services include AI-driven sales optimization, service triage, and parts demand forecasting. Maximize your efficiency.
scenes.illustrationPrompt: Flowchart of services offered, showcasing sales, service, and parts management.

scenes.headline: Proven Methodology for Success
scenes.subcopy: Our structured approach ensures effective implementation and governance.
scenes.voiceoverScript: We follow a clear methodology that emphasizes governance, access control, and reliability in AI deployment.
scenes.illustrationPrompt: Timeline showing the rollout phases from pilot to full-scale implementation.

scenes.headline: Your Choice for AI Excellence
scenes.subcopy: Select Ring Power for a partnership that prioritizes your needs.
scenes.voiceoverScript: Choosing Ring Power means opting for a partner committed to your success. We ensure internal capability transfer without vendor lock-in.
scenes.illustrationPrompt: Decision matrix showing options for partnership and internal capability transfer.

scenes.headline: Your Questions Answered
scenes.subcopy: We address common concerns about AI implementation.
scenes.voiceoverScript: Have questions? We provide clear answers about governance, reliability, and internal capability transfer.
scenes.illustrationPrompt: FAQ section with common questions and concise answers.

scenes.headline: Ready to Transform?
scenes.subcopy: Contact us to explore tailored AI solutions for your operations.
scenes.voiceoverScript: Join us at Ring Power to leverage AI for operational excellence. Let's discuss your unique needs today.
scenes.illustrationPrompt: Call-to-action graphic encouraging contact and engagement.
